title: SPECIAL EDUCATION SERVICES AND PROGRAMS - 211info
text: MALHEUR EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT SPECIAL EDUCATION SERVICES AND PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF The Student Services/Special Education Department at Malheur Education Service District Region 14 helps school districts support students with unique learning needs. Referral, diagnosis, consultation, and direct treatment therapy services are provided. 363 A Street W Vale, OR 97918 Eligibility: Ages 0-21 Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 473-4821 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 473-4821 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Huntington and Malheur Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Services: Special Education Plan Development Student Disability Services Transition Services for Students with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EASTERN OREGON COMMUNITY BASED SERVICES HUB EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - PRESCHOOL PROMISE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MALHEUR EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT
